name: claude-code
description: Spawn and monitor Claude Code coding sessions from Kins with live progress cards in the conversation
author: KinBot

authMode.label: Authentication mode
authMode.description: subscription reads ~/.claude/.credentials.json (Claude Max OAuth). apiKey requires an Anthropic API key and bills pay-per-token.

apiKey.label: Anthropic API key
apiKey.description: Used only when authMode is apiKey. Leave empty for subscription mode.

defaultWorkingDir.label: Default working directory
defaultWorkingDir.description: Base directory under which sessions run when the caller does not specify one. Leave empty to require an explicit workingDir on every call.

defaultMaxTurns.label: Default max turns
defaultMaxTurns.description: Hard cap on the number of agentic turns per session. Prevents runaway loops.

permissionMode.label: Permission mode
permissionMode.description: bypassPermissions skips all prompts (full autonomy). acceptEdits auto-accepts file edits only. plan creates a plan without executing.

binaryPath.label: Claude binary path
binaryPath.description: Absolute path to the claude CLI binary. Leave empty to let the SDK resolve it via the system PATH. Useful when claude is installed in a directory not exposed to the KinBot service (e.g. ~/.local/bin on systemd user services).
